# Data masking

For information about UC Davis computing resources for data-intensive work, see @sec-slurm.

## General Overview

{{< include data-masking/general-overview.qmd >}}

### What is Data Masking?

{{< include data-masking/what-is-data-masking.qmd >}}

### Using tidy evaluation for data masking

{{< include data-masking/tidy-evaluation-for-data-masking.qmd >}}

## Data masking vs. tidy selection {#sec-data-masking-vs-tidy-selection}

{{< include data-masking/masking-vs-selection.qmd >}}

### The `.data` pronoun does not belong in tidy selection

{{< include data-masking/data-pronoun-tidy-selection.qmd >}}

## Technical Overview

{{< include data-masking/technical-overview.qmd >}}

### Example

{{< include data-masking/descriptive-table-example.qmd >}}
